'''womamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yalla|yalla]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yalla|yalla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| womamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:womamithi|womamithi]] || [[word:womamiji|womamiji]] || [[word:womamishi|womamishi]] || [[word:womamiki|womamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:womamuthuthu|womamuthuthu]] || [[word:womamujuju|womamujuju]] || [[word:womamushushu|womamushushu]] || [[word:womamukuku|womamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:womamuthu|womamuthu]] || [[word:womamuju|womamuju]] || [[word:womamushu|womamushu]] || [[word:womamuku|womamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:womamufthuf|womamufthuf]] || [[word:womamufjuf|womamufjuf]] || [[word:womamufshuf|womamufshuf]] || [[word:womamufkuf|womamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:womamethe|womamethe]] || [[word:womameje|womameje]] || [[word:womameshe|womameshe]] || [[word:womameke|womameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:womamothotho|womamothotho]] || [[word:womamojojo|womamojojo]] || [[word:womamoshosho|womamoshosho]] || [[word:womamokoko|womamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:womamotho|womamotho]] || [[word:womamojo|womamojo]] || [[word:womamosho|womamosho]] || [[word:womamoko|womamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:womamofthof|womamofthof]] || [[word:womamofjof|womamofjof]] || [[word:womamofshof|womamofshof]] || [[word:womamofkof|womamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:womamÃŸfthÃŸf|womamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfjÃŸf|womamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfshÃŸf|womamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfkÃŸf|womamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:womamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|womamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|womamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|womamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|womamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:womamÃŸfthÃŸf|womamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfjÃŸf|womamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfshÃŸf|womamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfkÃŸf|womamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:womamÃŸfthÃŸf|womamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfjÃŸf|womamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfshÃŸf|womamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womamÃŸfkÃŸf|womamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:womamÃḊthÃḊ|womamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:womamÃḊjÃḊ|womamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:womamÃḊshÃḊ|womamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:womamÃḊkÃḊ|womamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:womamathatha|womamathatha]] || [[word:womamajaja|womamajaja]] || [[word:womamashasha|womamashasha]] || [[word:womamakaka|womamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:womamatha|womamatha]] || [[word:womamaja|womamaja]] || [[word:womamasha|womamasha]] || [[word:womamaka|womamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:womamafthaf|womamafthaf]] || [[word:womamafjaf|womamafjaf]] || [[word:womamafshaf|womamafshaf]] || [[word:womamafkaf|womamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:womamasha|womamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:womamshÃḋsha|womamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womamrosha|womamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womamusha|womamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:womamyasha|womamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomamnkshÃḋsha|gowomamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomamnkrosha|gowomamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomamnkmusha|gowomamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomamnkyasha|gowomamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:womamamasha|womamamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:womamamshÃḋsha|womamamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womamamrosha|womamamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womamamusha|womamamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:womamamyasha|womamamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomamamnkshÃḋsha|gowomamamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomamamnkrosha|gowomamamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomamamnkmusha|gowomamamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomamamnkyasha|gowomamamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wemÃḊmasha|wemÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wemÃḊmshÃḋsha|wemÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wemÃḊmrosha|wemÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wemÃḊmusha|wemÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wemÃḊmyasha|wemÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowemÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gowemÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowemÃḊmnkrosha|gowemÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowemÃḊmnkmusha|gowemÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowemÃḊmnkyasha|gowemÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:womfamasha|womfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:womfamshÃḋsha|womfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womfamrosha|womfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womfamusha|womfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:womfamyasha|womfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomfamnkshÃḋsha|gowomfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomfamnkrosha|gowomfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomfamnkmusha|gowomfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomfamnkyasha|gowomfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
